revision.text:
'''水無月祭 (国領)'''（みなづきまつり）は、[[兵庫県]][[丹波市]][[春日町]]国領で[[江戸時代]]中期から続く[[川裾祭]]<ref name="burari">[http://burari.city.tamba.hyogo.jp/exciting/minatuki.html 丹波流のほのんぶらり旅【7月31日（金）開催】国領水無月まつり]</ref><ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。
== 概要 == 江戸時代中期より250年以上続く春日町国領地区で行われてきた[[伝統行事]]である。[[夏]]には決まって[[疫病]]が発生し、現在のような画期的医療法もなかった時代にあって、人々はこの時期になると川辺に集まり[[神]]を祀り、身体を洗い清めた。[[太陰暦]]のため、現在の[[7月31日]]が1年のちょうど中間にあたるため、人々は半年間を無事に過ごせたことを感謝し、後半の半年も健やかに過ごせるようお札を授かり祈祷した<ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。
=== 行事 === *午後4時:喜寿札授与（巡礼橋水無月祭壇場） *午後6時:[[射的場]] *午後7時:[[万灯流し]]（[[竹田川]]巡礼橋） *午後7時と8時半:ストリートダンス *午後7時半:コンチャンバンド （2015年度の場合）<ref name="tanba"></ref>
== 主催 == *国領自治会・国領水無月実行委員会<ref name="tanba"></ref>
=== 協賛 === *丹波市商工会春日支部<ref name="tanba"></ref> *国領商店街<ref name="tanba"></ref>
{{デフォルトソート:かわすそまつり}}
[[Category:兵庫県の祭り]] [[Category:丹波市]]

'''水無月祭'''（みなづきまつり）は、[[兵庫県]][[丹波市]][[春日町]]国領で[[江戸時代]]中期から続く[[川裾祭]]<ref name="burari">[http://burari.city.tamba.hyogo.jp/exciting/minatuki.html 丹波流のほのんぶらり旅【7月31日（金）開催】国領水無月まつり]</ref><ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。
== 概要 == 江戸時代中期より250年以上続く春日町国領地区で行われてきた[[伝統行事]]である。[[夏]]には決まって[[疫病]]が発生し、現在のような画期的医療法もなかった時代にあって、人々はこの時期になると川辺に集まり[[神]]を祀り、身体を洗い清めた。[[太陰暦]]のため、現在の[[7月31日]]が1年のちょうど中間にあたるため、人々は半年間を無事に過ごせたことを感謝し、後半の半年も健やかに過ごせるようお札を授かり祈祷した<ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。
=== 行事 === *午後4時:喜寿札授与（巡礼橋水無月祭壇場） *午後6時:[[射的場]] *午後7時:[[万灯流し]]（[[竹田川]]巡礼橋） *午後7時と8時半:ストリートダンス *午後7時半:コンチャンバンド （2015年度の場合）<ref name="tanba"></ref>
== 主催 == *国領自治会・国領水無月実行委員会<ref name="tanba"></ref>
=== 協賛 === *丹波市商工会春日支部<ref name="tanba"></ref> *国領商店街<ref name="tanba"></ref>
{{デフォルトソート:かわすそまつり}}

== 概要 == 江戸時代中期より250年以上続く春日町国領地区で行われてきた[[伝統行事]]である。[[夏]]には決まって[[疫病]]が発生し、現在のような画期的医療法もなかった時代にあって、人々はこの時期になると川辺に集まり[[神]]を祀り、身体を洗い清めた。[[太陰暦]]のため、現在の[[7月31日]]が1年のちょうど中間にあたるため、人々は半年間を無事に過ごせたことを感謝し、後半の半年も健やかに過ごせるようお札を授かり祈祷した<ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。
=== 行事 === *午後4時:喜寿札授与（巡礼橋水無月祭壇場） *午後6時:[[射的場]] *午後7時:[[万灯流し]]（[[竹田川]]巡礼橋） *午後7時と8時半:ストリートダンス *午後7時半:コンチャンバンド （2015年度の場合）<ref name="tanba"></ref>

== 関連項目 == * [[川裾祭]]

revision.comment: 水野白楓 がページ「[[水無月祭 (国領)]]」を「[[水無月祭]]」に移動しました: 現状競合記事が無く、かつ括弧内の内容が大字からと細かすぎる。

'''水無月祭'''（みなづきまつり）は、[[兵庫県]][[丹波市]][[春日町]]国領で[[江戸時代]]中期から続く[[川裾祭]]<ref name="burari">[http://burari.city.tamba.hyogo.jp/exciting/minatuki.html 丹波流のほのんぶらり旅【7月31日（金）開催】国領水無月まつり]</ref><ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。

江戸時代中期より250年以上続く春日町国領地区竹田川周辺で行われてきた[[伝統行事]]である。[[夏]]には決まって[[疫病]]が発生し、現在のような画期的医療法もなかった時代にあって、人々はこの時期になると川辺に集まり[[神]]を祀り、身体を洗い清めた。[[太陰暦]]のため、現在の[[7月31日]]が1年のちょうど中間にあたるため、人々は半年間を無事に過ごせたことを感謝し、後半の半年も健やかに過ごせるようお札を授かり祈祷した<ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。
=== 行事 === [[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8695.JPG|thumb|180px|right|祭りの日の町の様子。]] *午後4時:喜寿札授与（巡礼橋水無月祭壇場） *午後6時:[[射的場]] *午後7時:[[万灯流し]]（[[竹田川]]巡礼橋） *午後7時と8時半:ストリートダンス *午後7時半:コンチャンバンド （2015年度の場合）<ref name="tanba"></ref>

=== 協賛 === *丹波市商工会春日支部<ref name="tanba"></ref> *国領商店街<ref name="tanba"></ref>

[[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8752.JPG|thumb|300px|right|2015年国領水無月祭り、万灯流し（竹田川巡礼橋）。]]
'''国領水無月祭'''（こくりょうみなづきまつり）は、[[兵庫県]][[丹波市]][[春日町]]国領で[[江戸時代]]中期から続く[[川裾祭]]<ref name="burari">[http://burari.city.tamba.hyogo.jp/exciting/minatuki.html 丹波流のほのんぶらり旅【7月31日（金）開催】国領水無月まつり]</ref><ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。
== 概要 == [[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8730.JPG|thumb|240px|left|春日町国領地区竹田川周辺で行われる。]]
江戸時代中期より250年以上続く春日町国領地区竹田川周辺で行われてきた[[伝統行事]]である。[[夏]]には決まって[[疫病]]が発生し、現在のような画期的医療法もなかった時代にあって、人々はこの時期になると川辺に集まり[[神]]を祀り、身体を洗い清めた。[[太陰暦]]のため、現在の[[7月31日]]が1年のちょうど中間にあたるため、人々は半年間を無事に過ごせたことを感謝し、後半の半年も健やかに過ごせるようお札を授かり祈祷した<ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。
=== 行事 === [[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8695.JPG|thumb|180px|right|祭りの日の町の様子。]] *午後4時:喜寿札授与（巡礼橋水無月祭壇場） *午後6時:[[射的場]] *午後7時:[[万灯流し]]（[[竹田川]]巡礼橋） *午後7時と8時半:ストリートダンス *午後7時半:コンチャンバンド （2015年度の場合）<ref name="tanba"></ref>
== 主催 == *国領自治会・国領水無月実行委員会<ref name="tanba"></ref>
=== 協賛 === *丹波市商工会春日支部<ref name="tanba"></ref> *国領商店街<ref name="tanba"></ref>
==脚注== <references />

</gallery>

[[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8752.JPG|thumb|300px|right|2015年国領水無月祭り、万灯流し（竹田川巡礼橋）。]]
'''国領水無月祭'''（こくりょうみなづきまつり）は、[[兵庫県]][[丹波市]][[春日町]]国領で[[江戸時代]]中期から続く[[川裾祭]]。例年[[7月31日]]に行われる<ref name="burari">[http://burari.city.tamba.hyogo.jp/exciting/minatuki.html 丹波流のほのんぶらり旅【7月31日（金）開催】国領水無月まつり]</ref><ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。
== 概要 == [[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8730.JPG|thumb|240px|left|春日町国領地区竹田川周辺で行われる。]]
江戸時代中期より250年以上続く春日町国領地区竹田川周辺で行われてきた[[伝統行事]]である。[[夏]]には決まって[[疫病]]が発生し、現在のような画期的医療法もなかった時代にあって、人々はこの時期になると川辺に集まり[[神]]を祀り、身体を洗い清めた。[[太陰暦]]のため、現在の[[7月31日]]が1年のちょうど中間にあたるため、人々は半年間を無事に過ごせたことを感謝し、後半の半年も健やかに過ごせるようお札を授かり祈祷した<ref name="tanba">[http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923 丹波市商工会 国領 水無月祭 7月31日]</ref>。
=== 行事 === [[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8695.JPG|thumb|180px|right|祭りの日の町の様子。]] *午後4時:喜寿札授与（巡礼橋水無月祭壇場） *午後6時:[[射的場]] *午後7時:[[万灯流し]]（[[竹田川]]巡礼橋） *午後7時と8時半:ストリートダンス *午後7時半:コンチャンバンド （2015年度の場合）<ref name="tanba"></ref>
== 交通アクセス == *'''鉄道''' :[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[黒井駅 (兵庫県)|黒井駅]]より路線バス野瀬行き「進修校前」下車。 *'''自動車''' :[[舞鶴若狭自動車道]][[春日インターチェンジ]]より約8分。
== 主催 == *国領自治会・国領水無月実行委員会<ref name="tanba"></ref>
=== 協賛 === *丹波市商工会春日支部<ref name="tanba"></ref> *国領商店街<ref name="tanba"></ref>
==脚注== <references />
==Gallery== <gallery mode=packed heights=130px> File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|祭りに向かう人たち。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|竹田川で行われる万灯流し。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|町中心部。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|町中心部。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|祭り会場中心部。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|町はずれ。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|支流国領川。
</gallery>
== 関連項目 == * [[川裾祭]] * [[あやべ水無月まつり]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=999 丹波市商工会][http://www.tanba.or.jp/blog/?p=923] * [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HvcJuksrB-4&feature=youtu.be ２０１５年（平成２７年）国領水無月祭り 丹波市（丹波新報社）] * [http://t-kodomo.jp/event?mc_id=1087 子育てイベント情報 NPO法人Tプラスファミリーサポート]
{{デフォルトソート:こくりようみなつきまつり}}

== 交通アクセス == *'''鉄道''' :[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[黒井駅 (兵庫県)|黒井駅]]より路線バス野瀬行き「進修校前」下車。 *'''自動車''' :[[舞鶴若狭自動車道]][[春日インターチェンジ]]より約8分。
== 主催 == *国領自治会・国領水無月実行委員会<ref name="tanba" />
=== 協賛 === *丹波市商工会春日支部<ref name="tanba" /> *国領商店街<ref name="tanba" />
==Gallery== <gallery mode=packed heights=130px> File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|祭りに向かう人たち。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|竹田川で行われる万灯流し。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|町中心部。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|町中心部。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|祭り会場中心部。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|町はずれ。 File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|支流国領川。
</gallery>

[[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8752.JPG|thumb|300px|right|2015年国領水無月祭り、万灯流し（竹田川巡礼橋）。]]
'''国領水無月祭'''（こくりょうみなづきまつり）は、[[兵庫県]][[丹波市]]春日町（旧[[氷上郡]][[春日町 (兵庫県)|春日町]]）国領で[[江戸時代]]中期から続く[[川裾祭]]。例年[[7月31日]]に行われる<ref>{{Cite web |date= |url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675 |title=国領水無月祭 |publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟 |accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |date= |url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf |title=国領地区自治協議会だより |format=PDF |publisher=国領地区自治協議会 |accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref>。
== 概要 == [[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8730.JPG|thumb|春日町国領地区竹田川周辺で行われる。]] [[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8695.JPG|thumb|180px|right|祭りの日の町の様子。]] 江戸時代中期より250年以上続く春日町国領地区竹田川周辺で行われてきた[[伝統行事]]である。[[夏]]には決まって[[疫病]]が発生し、現在のような画期的医療法もなかった時代にあって、人々はこの時期になると川辺に集まり[[神]]を祀り、身体を洗い清めた。[[太陰暦]]のため、現在の[[7月31日]]が1年のちょうど中間にあたるため、人々は半年間を無事に過ごせたことを感謝し、後半の半年も健やかに過ごせるようお札を授かり祈祷した。
== 行事 == * 午後4時:喜寿札授与（巡礼橋水無月祭壇場） * 午後6時:[[射的場]] * 午後7時:[[万灯流し]]（[[竹田川]]巡礼橋） * 午後7時と8時半:ストリートダンス * 午後7時半:コンチャンバンド （2015年度の場合）
== 交通アクセス == * '''鉄道''' : [[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[黒井駅 (兵庫県)|黒井駅]]より路線バス野瀬行き「進修校前」下車。 * '''自動車''' : [[舞鶴若狭自動車道]][[春日インターチェンジ]]より約8分。
== 主催 == * 国領自治会・国領水無月実行委員会
=== 協賛 === * 丹波市商工会春日支部 * 国領商店街
== ギャラリー == <gallery widths="180" heights="120"> 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|祭りに向かう人たち。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|竹田川で行われる万灯流し。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|町中心部。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|町中心部。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|祭り会場中心部。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|町はずれ。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|支流国領川。 </gallery>

'''Kokuryō Minazuki Festival''' (国領水無月祭) is a {{ill|riverside festival|ja|川裾祭}} held annually on {{ill|July 31|ja|7月31日}} in the Kokuryō district of {{ill|Kasuga, Hyōgo|ja|春日町 (兵庫県)}}, {{ill|Tamba, Hyōgo|ja|丹波市}}, Japan. The festival has continued since the mid-{{ill|Edo period|ja|江戸時代}}.<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675|title=国領水無月祭|publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf|title=国領地区自治協議会だより|format=PDF|publisher=国領地区自治協議会|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref>
== Overview == The festival is a traditional event that has been held for over 250 years around the {{ill|Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|ja|竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)}} in the Kokuryō district of Kasuga, Tamba City. In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.
Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the {{ill|lunar calendar|ja|太陰暦}}, people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals.
== Events == * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge * 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery * 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge) * 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances * 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band *(Based on the 2015 schedule)*
== Access == * '''By Train:''' : From {{ill|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|ja|黒井駅 (兵庫県)}} on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' : About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|ja|舞鶴若狭自動車道}}.
== Organizers == * Kokuryō Residents’ Association & Kokuryō Minazuki Festival Executive Committee
=== Sponsors === * Kasuga Branch, Tamba City Chamber of Commerce * Kokuryō Shopping District
== Gallery == <gallery widths="180" heights="120"> 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|People heading to the festival 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|Lantern floating on the Takeda River 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|Town center 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|Town center 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|Festival venue center 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|Outskirts of town 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|Kokuryō River, a tributary </gallery>

revision.text: '''Kokuryō Minazuki Festival''' (国領水無月祭) is a {{ill|riverside festival|ja|川裾祭}} held annually on {{ill|July 31|ja|7月31日}} in the Kokuryō district of {{ill|Kasuga, Hyōgo|ja|春日町 (兵庫県)}}, {{ill|Tamba, Hyōgo|ja|丹波市}}, Japan. The festival has continued since the mid-{{ill|Edo period|ja|江戸時代}}.<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675|title=国領水無月祭|publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf|title=国領地区自治協議会だより|format=PDF|publisher=国領地区自治協議会|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref>== Overview ==The festival is a traditional event that has been held for over 250 years around the {{ill|Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|ja|竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)}} in the Kokuryō district of Kasuga, Tamba City. In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the {{ill|lunar calendar|ja|太陰暦}}, people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals.== Events ==* 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band *(Based on the 2015 schedule)*== Access ==* '''By Train:''' : From {{ill|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|ja|黒井駅 (兵庫県)}} on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae."* '''By Car:''' : About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|ja|舞鶴若狭自動車道}}.== Organizers ==* Kokuryō Residents’ Association & Kokuryō Minazuki Festival Executive Committee=== Sponsors ===* Kasuga Branch, Tamba City Chamber of Commerce* Kokuryō Shopping District== Gallery ==<gallery widths="180" heights="120">2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|People heading to the festival2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|Lantern floating on the Takeda River2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|Festival venue center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|Outskirts of town2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|Kokuryō River, a '''Kokuryō Minazuki Festival''' (国領水無月祭) is a {{ill|riverside festival|ja|川裾祭}} held annually on {{ill|July 31|ja|7月31日}} in the Kokuryō district of {{ill|Kasuga, Hyōgo|ja|春日町 (兵庫県)}}, {{ill|Tamba, Hyōgo|ja|丹波市}}, Japan. The festival has continued since the mid-{{ill|Edo period|ja|江戸時代}}.<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675|title=国領水無月祭|publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf|title=国領地区自治協議会だより|format=PDF|publisher=国領地区自治協議会|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref>== Overview ==The festival is a traditional event that has been held for over 250 years around the {{ill|Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|ja|竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)}} in the Kokuryō district of Kasuga, Tamba City. In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the {{ill|lunar calendar|ja|太陰暦}}, people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals.== Events ==* 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band *(Based on the 2015 schedule)*== Access ==* '''By Train:''' : From {{ill|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|ja|黒井駅 (兵庫県)}} on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae."* '''By Car:''' : About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|ja|舞鶴若狭自動車道}}.== Organizers ==* Kokuryō Residents’ Association & Kokuryō Minazuki Festival Executive Committee=== Sponsors ===* Kasuga Branch, Tamba City Chamber of Commerce* Kokuryō Shopping District== Gallery ==<gallery widths="180" heights="120">2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|People '''Kokuryō Minazuki Festival''' (国領水無月祭) is a {{ill|riverside festival|ja|川裾祭}} held annually on {{ill|July 31|ja|7月31日}} in the Kokuryō district of {{ill|Kasuga, Hyōgo|ja|春日町 (兵庫県)}}, {{ill|Tamba, Hyōgo|ja|丹波市}}, Japan. The festival has continued since the mid-{{ill|Edo period|ja|江戸時代}}.<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675|title=国領水無月祭|publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf|title=国領地区自治協議会だより|format=PDF|publisher=国領地区自治協議会|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref> ==Overview== The festival is a traditional event that has been held for over 250 years around the {{ill|Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|ja|竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)}} in the Kokuryō district of Kasuga, Tamba City. In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the {{ill|lunar calendar|ja|太陰暦}}, people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band *(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' : From {{ill|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|ja|黒井駅 (兵庫県)}} on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae."* '''By Car:''' : About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|ja|舞鶴若狭自動車道}}. ==Organizers== * Kokuryō Residents’ Association & Kokuryō Minazuki Festival Executive Committee= ==Sponsors== =* heading to the festival2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|Lantern floating on the Takeda River2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り revision.text:
'''Kokuryō Minazuki Festival''' (国領水無月祭) is a {{ill|riverside festival|ja|川裾祭|12=draft}} held annually on {{ill|July 31|ja|7月31日|12=draft}} in the Kokuryō district of {{ill|Kasuga, Hyōgo|ja|春日町 (兵庫県)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tamba, Hyōgo|ja|丹波市|12=draft}}, Japan. The festival has continued since the mid-{{ill|Edo period|ja|江戸時代|12=draft}}.<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675|title=国領水無月祭|publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf|title=国領地区自治協議会だより|format=PDF|publisher=国領地区自治協議会|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref> ==Overview== The festival is a traditional event that has been held for over 250 years around the {{ill|Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|ja|竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)|12=draft}} in the Kokuryō district of Kasuga, Tamba City. In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the {{ill|lunar calendar|ja|太陰暦|12=draft}}, people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|12=draft}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' : From {{ill|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|ja|黒井駅 (兵庫県)|12=draft}} on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' : About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|12=draft}} on the {{ill|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|ja|舞鶴若狭自動車道|12=draft}}.
==Organizers== * Kokuryō Residents’ Association & Kokuryō Minazuki Festival Executive Committee= ==Sponsors== =* Kasuga Branch, Tamba City Chamber of Commerce* Kokuryō Shopping District ==Gallery== <gallery widths="180" heights="120">2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|People heading to the festival2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|Lantern floating on the Takeda River2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|Festival venue center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|Outskirts of town2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|Kokuryō River, a tributary</gallery> ==References== {{Reflist}} ==See Also== {{Commonscat|Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri}} * {{ill|Riverside festival|ja|川裾祭|12=draft}} * {{ill|Ayabe Minazuki Festival|ja|あやべ水無月まつり|12=draft}} * {{ill|Atago Festival (Tamba)|ja|愛宕祭 (丹波市)|12=draft}}]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]

revision.text:
[[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8752.JPG|thumb|300px|right|2015年国領水無月祭り、万灯流し（竹田川巡礼橋）。]]
'''国領水無月祭'''（こくりょうみなつきさい）は、[[兵庫県]][[丹波市]]春日町（旧[[氷上郡]][[春日町 (兵庫県)|春日町]]）国領で[[江戸時代]]中期から続く[[川裾祭]]。例年[[7月31日]]に行われる<ref>{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675 |title=国領水無月祭 |publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟 |accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf |title=国領地区自治協議会だより |format=PDF |publisher=国領地区自治協議会 |accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref>。
== 概要 == [[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8730.JPG|thumb|春日町国領地区竹田川周辺で行われる。]] [[File:2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8695.JPG|thumb|180px|right|祭りの日の町の様子。]] 江戸時代中期より250年以上続く春日町国領地区竹田川周辺で行われてきた[[伝統行事]]である。[[夏]]には決まって[[疫病]]が発生し、現在のような画期的医療法もなかった時代にあって、人々はこの時期になると川辺に集まり[[神]]を祀り、身体を洗い清めた。[[太陰暦]]のため、現在の[[7月31日]]が1年のちょうど中間にあたるため、人々は半年間を無事に過ごせたことを感謝し、後半の半年も健やかに過ごせるようお札を授かり祈祷した。
== 行事 == * 午後4時:喜寿札授与（巡礼橋水無月祭壇場） * 午後6時:[[射的場]] * 午後7時:[[万灯流し]]（[[竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)|竹田川]]巡礼橋） * 午後7時と8時半:ストリートダンス * 午後7時半:コンチャンバンド （2015年度の場合）
== 交通アクセス == * '''鉄道''' : [[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[黒井駅 (兵庫県)|黒井駅]]より路線バス野瀬行き「進修校前」下車。 * '''自動車''' : [[舞鶴若狭自動車道]][[春日インターチェンジ]]より約8分。
== 主催 == * 国領自治会・国領水無月実行委員会
=== 協賛 === * 丹波市商工会春日支部 * 国領商店街
== ギャラリー == <gallery widths="180" heights="120"> 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|祭りに向かう人たち。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|竹田川で行われる万灯流し。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|町中心部。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|町中心部。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|祭り会場中心部。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|町はずれ。 2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tamba,Hyogo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|支流国領川。 </gallery>
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{Commonscat|Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri}} * [[川裾祭]] * [[あやべ水無月まつり]] * [[愛宕祭 (丹波市)]]
{{デフォルトソート:こくりようみなつきまつり}} [[Category:兵庫県の祭り]] [[Category:兵庫県の花火大会]] [[Category:丹波市の歴史]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri]][[ja:国領水無月祭]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q22130187]] Wikidata name: Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q22130187]] Wikidata name: Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kokuryō Minazuki Festival''' (国領水無月祭) is a {{ill|Kawasuso Festival|lt=Kawasuso Festival|lt=Riverside festival|ja|川裾祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/riverside festival|qq=}} held annually on [[:en:July 31|July 31]] in the Kokuryō district of [[:en:Kasuga, Hyōgo|Kasuga, Hyōgo]], [[:en:Tanba, Hyōgo|Tanba, Hyōgo]], Japan. The festival has continued since the mid-[[:en:Edo period|Edo period]].<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675|title=国領水無月祭|publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf|title=国領地区自治協議会だより|format=PDF|publisher=国領地区自治協議会|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref> ==Overview== The festival is a traditional event that has been held for over 250 years around the {{ill|Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|ja|竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|qq=|1=Takeda River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11599330}} in the Kokuryō district of Kasuga, Tanba City. In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the [[:en:Lunar calendar|Lunar calendar]], people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From [[:en:Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)]] on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|qq=|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11088794}} on the [[:en:Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway]].
==Organizers== * Kokuryō Residents’ Association & Kokuryō Minazuki Festival Executive Committee= ==Sponsors== =* Kasuga Branch, Tanba City Chamber of Commerce* Kokuryō Shopping District ==Gallery== <gallery widths="180" heights="120">2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|People heading to the festival2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|Lantern floating on the Takeda River2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|Festival venue center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|Outskirts of town2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|Kokuryō River, a tributary</gallery> ==References== {{Reflist}} ==See Also== {{Commonscat|Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri}} * {{ill|Kawasuso Festival|ja|川裾祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Riverside festival|qq=}} * {{ill|Ayabe Minazuki Festival|ja|あやべ水無月まつり|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ayabe Minazuki Festival|qq=|1=Ayabe Minazuki Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11258475}} * {{ill|Atago Festival (Tanba)|ja|愛宕祭 (丹波市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Festival (Tanba)|qq=|1=Atago Matsuri (Tanba City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48745772}}]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]

In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the [[:en:Lunar calendar|Lunar calendar]], people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From [[:en:Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)]] on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|qq=|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11088794}} on the [[:en:Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway]].

In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the [[:en:Lunar calendar|Lunar calendar]], people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From [[:en:Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)]] on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11088794}} on the [[:en:Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway]].
==Organizers== * Kokuryō Residents’ Association & Kokuryō Minazuki Festival Executive Committee= ==Sponsors== =* Kasuga Branch, Tanba City Chamber of Commerce* Kokuryō Shopping District ==Gallery== <gallery widths="180" heights="120">2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|People heading to the festival2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|Lantern floating on the Takeda River2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|Festival venue center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|Outskirts of town2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|Kokuryō River, a tributary</gallery> ==References== {{Reflist}} ==See Also== {{Commonscat|Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri}} * {{ill|Kawasuso Festival|ja|川裾祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Riverside festival|qq=}} * {{ill|Ayabe Minazuki Festival|ja|あやべ水無月まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ayabe Minazuki Festival|1=Ayabe Minazuki Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11258475}} * {{ill|Atago Festival (Tanba)|ja|愛宕祭 (丹波市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Festival (Tanba)|1=Atago Matsuri (Tanba City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48745772}}]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri]][[ja:国領水無月祭]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22130187]] Wikidata name: Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22130187]] Wikidata name: Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kokuryō Minazuki Festival''' (国領水無月祭) is a {{ill|Kawasuso Festival|lt=Kawasuso Festival|lt=Riverside festival|ja|川裾祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/riverside festival|qq=}} held annually on [[:en:July 31|July 31]] in the Kokuryō district of [[:en:Kasuga, Hyōgo|Kasuga, Hyōgo]], [[:en:Tanba, Hyōgo|Tanba, Hyōgo]], Japan. The festival has continued since the mid-[[:en:Edo period|Edo period]].<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675|title=国領水無月祭|publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf|title=国領地区自治協議会だより|format=PDF|publisher=国領地区自治協議会|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref> ==Overview== The festival is a traditional event that has been held for over 250 years around the {{ill|Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|ja|竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|1=Takeda River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11599330}} in the Kokuryō district of Kasuga, Tanba City. In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the [[:en:Lunar calendar|Lunar calendar]], people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From [[:en:Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)]] on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11088794}} on the [[:en:Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway]].

The festival has continued since the mid-[[:en:Edo period|Edo period]].<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675|title=国領水無月祭|publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf|title=国領地区自治協議会だより|format=PDF|publisher=国領地区自治協議会|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref> ==Overview== The festival is a traditional event that has been held for over 250 years around the {{ill|Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|ja|竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|1=Takeda River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11599330}} in the Kokuryō district of Kasuga, Tanba City. In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the [[:en:Lunar calendar|Lunar calendar]], people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From [[:en:Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)]] on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11088794}} on the [[:en:Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri]][[ja:国領水無月祭]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri]][[ja:国領水無月祭]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri]][[ja:国領水無月祭]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22130187]] Wikidata name: Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22130187]] Wikidata name: Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kokuryō Minazuki Festival''' (国領水無月祭) is a {{ill|Kawasuso Festival|lt=Kawasuso Festival|lt=Riverside festival|ja|川裾祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/riverside festival|qq=}} held annually on [[:en:July 31|July 31]] in the Kokuryō district of [[:en:Kasuga, Hyōgo|Kasuga, Hyōgo]], [[:en:Tanba, Hyōgo|Tanba, Hyōgo]], Japan. The festival has continued since the mid-[[:en:Edo period|Edo period]].<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675|title=国領水無月祭|publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf|title=国領地区自治協議会だより|format=PDF|publisher=国領地区自治協議会|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref> ==Overview== The festival is a traditional event that has been held for over 250 years around the {{ill|Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|ja|竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|1=Takeda River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11599330}} in the Kokuryō district of Kasuga, Tanba City. In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the [[:en:Lunar calendar|Lunar calendar]], people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From [[:en:Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)]] on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11088794}} on the [[:en:Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway]].

In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|en|Lunar calendar|WD=Q185688|lt=Lunar calendar}}, people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From {{ill|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|en|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|WD=Q1043268|lt=Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)}} on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11088794}} on the {{ill|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|en|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|WD=Q11613730|lt=Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway}}.
==Organizers== * Kokuryō Residents’ Association & Kokuryō Minazuki Festival Executive Committee= ==Sponsors== =* Kasuga Branch, Tanba City Chamber of Commerce* Kokuryō Shopping District ==Gallery== <gallery widths="180" heights="120">2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|People heading to the festival2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|Lantern floating on the Takeda River2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|Festival venue center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|Outskirts of town2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|Kokuryō River, a tributary</gallery> ==References== {{Reflist}} ==See Also== {{Commonscat|Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri}} * {{ill|Kawasuso Festival|ja|川裾祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Riverside festival|qq=}} * {{ill|Ayabe Minazuki Festival|ja|あやべ水無月まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ayabe Minazuki Festival|1=Ayabe Minazuki Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11258475}} * {{ill|Atago Festival (Tanba)|ja|愛宕祭 (丹波市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Festival (Tanba)|1=Atago Matsuri (Tanba City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48745772}}]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]

In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|en|Lunar calendar|WD=Q185688|lt=Lunar calendar}}, people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From {{ill|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|en|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|WD=Q1043268|lt=Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)}} on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11088794}} on the {{ill|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|en|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|WD=Q11613730|lt=Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway}}.

In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|en|Lunar calendar|WD=Q185688|lt=Lunar calendar|1=Lunar calendar}}, people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=Water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From {{ill|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|en|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|WD=Q1043268|lt=Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|1=Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)}} on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11088794}} on the {{ill|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|en|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|WD=Q11613730|lt=Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|1=Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway}}.

In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|en|Lunar calendar|qid=Q185688|lt=Lunar calendar|1=Lunar calendar}}, people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=Water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From {{ill|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|en|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|qid=Q1043268|lt=Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|1=Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)}} on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11088794}} on the {{ill|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|en|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|qid=Q11613730|lt=Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|1=Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway}}.
==Organizers== * Kokuryō Residents’ Association & Kokuryō Minazuki Festival Executive Committee= ==Sponsors== =* Kasuga Branch, Tanba City Chamber of Commerce* Kokuryō Shopping District ==Gallery== <gallery widths="180" heights="120">2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|People heading to the festival2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|Lantern floating on the Takeda River2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|Festival venue center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|Outskirts of town2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|Kokuryō River, a tributary</gallery> ==References== {{Reflist}} ==See Also== {{Commonscat|Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri}} * {{ill|Kawasuso Festival|ja|川裾祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Riverside festival|qq=}} * {{ill|Ayabe Minazuki Festival|ja|あやべ水無月まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ayabe Minazuki Festival|1=Ayabe Minazuki Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11258475}} * {{ill|Atago Festival (Tanba)|ja|愛宕祭 (丹波市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Festival (Tanba)|1=Atago Matsuri (Tanba City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q48745772}}]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]

'''Kokuryō Minazuki Festival''' (国領水無月祭) is a {{ill|Kawasuso Festival|lt=Kawasuso Festival|lt=Riverside festival|ja|川裾祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/riverside festival|qq=}} held annually on {{ill|July 31|en|July 31|qid=Q2715|lt=July 31|1=July 31}} in the Kokuryō district of {{ill|Kasuga, Hyōgo|en|Kasuga, Hyōgo|qid=Q6374868|lt=Kasuga, Hyōgo|1=Kasuga, Hyōgo}}, [[:en:Tanba, Hyōgo|Tanba, Hyōgo]], Japan. The festival has continued since the mid-{{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}.<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=http://kitakinki.gr.jp/publictopics/5675|title=国領水無月祭|publisher=北近畿広域観光連盟|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.city.tamba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/38717.pdf|title=国領地区自治協議会だより|format=PDF|publisher=国領地区自治協議会|accessdate=2019-06-27}}</ref> ==Overview== The festival is a traditional event that has been held for over 250 years around the {{ill|Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|ja|竹田川 (兵庫県・京都府)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda River (Hyōgo and Kyoto)|1=Takeda River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11599330}} in the Kokuryō district of Kasuga, Tanba City. In the past, summer often brought outbreaks of epidemics. In an era without advanced medical treatments, people gathered by the riverside to worship the gods and purify themselves through ritual cleansing.Since the festival coincided with the midpoint of the year according to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|en|Lunar calendar|qid=Q185688|lt=Lunar calendar|1=Lunar calendar}}, people expressed gratitude for the past six months and prayed for good health in the remaining half of the year by receiving amulets and participating in purification rituals. ==Events== * 4:00 PM: Distribution of longevity amulets at the Minazuki Festival altar on Pilgrimage Bridge* 6:00 PM: Shooting gallery* 7:00 PM: {{ill|Lantern Floating|ja|万灯流し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lantern Floating|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 灯籠流し|1=Water lantern|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q391339}} on the Takeda River (Pilgrimage Bridge)* 7:00 PM & 8:30 PM: Street dance performances* 7:30 PM: Performance by Konchan Band**(Based on the 2015 schedule)* ==Access== * '''By Train:''' **From {{ill|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|en|Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|qid=Q1043268|lt=Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)|1=Kuroi Station (Hyōgo)}} on JR, take the Nosé-bound bus and get off at "Shinshūkō-mae." * '''By Car:''' **About 8 minutes from {{ill|Kasuga Interchange|ja|春日インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Interchange|1=Kasuga interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11088794}} on the {{ill|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|en|Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|qid=Q11613730|lt=Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway|1=Maizuru-Wakasa Expressway}}.
==Organizers== * Kokuryō Residents’ Association & Kokuryō Minazuki Festival Executive Committee= ==Sponsors== =* Kasuga Branch, Tanba City Chamber of Commerce* Kokuryō Shopping District ==Gallery== <gallery widths="180" heights="120">2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8564.JPG|People heading to the festival2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8726.JPG|Lantern floating on the Takeda River2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8597.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8620.JPG|Town center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8635.JPG|Festival venue center2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8659.JPG|Outskirts of town2015-07-31Minazuki-Festival Kokuryo,Tanba,Hyōgo-Japan 国領水無月祭り 8580.JPG|Kokuryō River, a tributary</gallery> ==References== {{Reflist}} ==See Also== {{Commonscat|Kokuryō Minazuki Matsuri}} * {{ill|Kawasuso Festival|ja|川裾祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Riverside festival|qq=}} * {{ill|Ayabe Minazuki Festival|ja|あやべ水無月まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ayabe Minazuki Festival|1=Ayabe Minazuki Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11258475}} * {{ill|Atago Festival (Tanba)|ja|愛宕祭 (丹波市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Festival (Tanba)|1=Atago Matsuri (Tanba City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q48745772}}]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]
